chapter_title.en: The Call to Prayer and the Establishment of Prayer and the Reward of the Muezzins

text: 881 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنْ أَذَّنَ فِي مِصْرٍ مِنْ أَمْصَارِ اَلْمُسْلِمِينَ سَنَةً وَجَبَتْ لَهُ اَلْجَنَّةُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.881 - The Messenger, and his family, said:
"Whoever calls the adhan (call to prayer) in one of the cities of the Muslims for a year, Paradise becomes obligatory for him."
